name: Afar Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: the sky and the unity of the Afar people

description: Three horizontal stripes of blue (top), white (middle), and green (bottom), with a regional emblem at the centre.
history: The Afar Region is one of the regional states of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, established under the 1995 Constitution. The region's flag was officially adopted as part of the symbols of the regional state.
